conditions.notes: FMLA Coordinator may require certification; written notice of requirement must be given each time.
conditions.source_text: The FMLA Coordinator may require that an employee's request for leave be supported by certification from a health care provider.

conditions.notes: Applies when need for leave is foreseeable.
conditions.source_text: When the need for leave is foreseeable, the employee should provide medical certification before the leave begins.

conditions.notes: Minimum time allowed for employee to provide requested certification.
conditions.source_text: At least fifteen (15) calendar days must be allowed for the employee to provide requested medical certification.

conditions.notes: Certification should be requested at time of leave request or within 2 business days.
conditions.source_text: Any request for medical certification should be made at the time the employee requests leave or within two (2) business days.

conditions.notes: For unforeseeable leave, certification requested within 2 business days after leave begins.
conditions.source_text: If the leave was unforeseen, the certification should be requested within two (2) business days after the leave has begun.

conditions.notes: Employer must specify in writing what is lacking; employee has 7 days to cure.
conditions.source_text: The employer must specify in writing what information is lacking, and give the employee seven (7) calendar days to cure the deficiency.

conditions.notes: Leave may be denied until certification is provided if foreseeable.
conditions.source_text: An employee who fails to provide certification within the requested allowable time frame (minimally fifteen (15) calendar days) may be denied leave until certification is provided if the leave was foreseeable.

conditions.notes: Leave continuation may be denied; reasonable time determined by FMLA Coordinator.
conditions.source_text: An employee failing to provide certification within this time frame may be denied leave continuation.

required_value.required_value: active duty orders and exigency certification

conditions.notes: Rest and recuperation exigency requires rest/recuperation orders or equivalent military documentation.
conditions.source_text: An employee requesting leave for a qualifying exigency must submit a copy of the covered military member's active duty orders and certification providing the appropriate facts.

required_value.required_value: health care provider cert or ITO/ITA

conditions.notes: Certification by authorized health care provider or Invitational Travel Order/Authorization accepted.
conditions.source_text: An employee requesting leave to care for a covered service member must submit a certification form completed by an authorized health care provider or a copy of an Invitational Travel Order or Invitational Travel Authorization.
